description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house surrounded by dense greenery and enclosed by a white perimeter wall. The house features a dark gable roof with solar panels, multiple chimneys, and a mix of traditional and modern architectural elements. The front facade has a prominent entryway with a portico supported by columns, and the windows are arranged in symmetrical rows. The backyard includes a spacious patio area, a swimming pool with lounge chairs and umbrellas, and additional outdoor seating areas. The property is landscaped with manicured lawns, shrubs, and mature trees, providing privacy and a sense of seclusion. The overall design blends classic and contemporary styles, making it suitable for upscale suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A large, two-story house with a dark gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio, all enclosed by a white wall and dense trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, symmetrical windows, and the gated entrance framed by dense trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, extensive tree coverage, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio with lounge chairs, and the back facade with large windows and outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Angled side-rear view emphasizing the pool area, patio, and the integration of the house with the surrounding greenery.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a portico supported by columns, steps leading up, and a decorative overhang
